_comment: Carrier advisory notes for quote formatter. Add/edit carriers here — no code change needed.
ONE: ONE: dich vu on dinh, nhieu chuyen / tuan
MSC: MSC: gia canh tranh, can booking som
CMA: CMA: yeu cau PREPAID, confirm som tranh rollover
YML: YML: on dinh, phu hop hang bulk volume
ZIM: ZIM: transit time tot voi East Coast
EMC: Evergreen: gia tot bulk, dat som
HMM: HMM: lich tau tot, gia canh tranh
HPL: Hapag-Lloyd: dich vu on dinh, phu hop hang regular
OOCL: OOCL: tuyen chac, transit tot US West Coast
